vllm.title: [Bugfix][VLM] Add fallback to SDPA for ViT model running on CPU backend
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FILL IN THE PR DESCRIPTION HERE
FIX #xxxx (link existing issues this PR will resolve)

#7186 enforced xformers on encoder attention for each ViT model, which broke the VLM support for CPU backend.
This PR aims to add fallback to SDPA for CPU backend to fix this.

vllm.title: [Core] Optimize Async + Multi-step
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR optimizes the async + multi-step further by implementing a "fully" async behavior between the postprocessor and the multi-step execution. Before that, the async was done only for the previous decode steps of the multi-step, where in this PR, the async is done on all previous steps of decode,

vllm.title: [Frontend] Multimodal support in offline chat
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR follows up to #5049 by adding support for multi-modal inputs in LLM.chat. To do so, I implemented a sync version of the chat parser.
cc @petersalas since I further refactored your parsing logic
Also fixes #8117

vllm.title: chore: Update check-wheel-size.py to read VLLM_MAX_SIZE_MB from env
vllm.author: haitwang-cloud
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This commit updates the check-wheel-size.py script to read the MAX_SIZE_MB value from the environment variable. The default value is set to 250 MB. This change allows for more flexibility in setting the maximum size of the wheel.
